description: Default prompt-injection bait signatures shipped with skill-sniffer (PLAN §8.9).

signatures.label: instruction-override phrase
signatures.description: "ignore all previous instructions" style override aimed at the reading agent.

signatures.label: system-prompt override
signatures.description: Direct attempt to override the host system prompt.

signatures.label: role-reassignment phrase
signatures.description: "you are now DAN/admin/root" style role reassignment.

signatures.label: memory-wipe phrase
signatures.description: "forget everything above" memory-wipe phrasing (occasionally legit UX copy).

signatures.label: exfiltration prompt
signatures.description: Attempt to exfiltrate the system prompt, hidden instructions, or secrets.

signatures.label: guardrail-bypass phrase
signatures.description: "don't tell the user" guardrail-bypass phrasing (occasionally legit UX copy).

signatures.label: suspicious instruction-like HTML comment
signatures.description: HTML comment that reads like an order to the agent rather than a note to a human.
